'''âw-sh-p''' ('''kawashap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:puggle|puggle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:puggle|puggle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-sh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kawashap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwashap|thiwashap]] || [[word:jiwashap|jiwashap]] || [[word:shiwashap|shiwashap]] || [[word:kiwashap|kiwashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwashap|thuthuwashap]] || [[word:jujuwashap|jujuwashap]] || [[word:shushuwashap|shushuwashap]] || [[word:kukuwashap|kukuwashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwashap|thuwashap]] || [[word:juwashap|juwashap]] || [[word:shuwashap|shuwashap]] || [[word:kuwashap|kuwashap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwashap|thuwashap]] || [[word:juwashap|juwashap]] || [[word:shuwashap|shuwashap]] || [[word:kuwashap|kuwashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewashap|thewashap]] || [[word:jewashap|jewashap]] || [[word:shewashap|shewashap]] || [[word:kewashap|kewashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowashap|thothowashap]] || [[word:jojowashap|jojowashap]] || [[word:shoshowashap|shoshowashap]] || [[word:kokowashap|kokowashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowashap|thowashap]] || [[word:jowashap|jowashap]] || [[word:showashap|showashap]] || [[word:kowashap|kowashap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowashap|thowashap]] || [[word:jowashap|jowashap]] || [[word:showashap|showashap]] || [[word:kowashap|kowashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwashap|thĂŠwashap]] || [[word:jĂŠwashap|jĂŠwashap]] || [[word:shĂŠwashap|shĂŠwashap]] || [[word:kĂŠwashap|kĂŠwashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawashap|thathawashap]] || [[word:jajawashap|jajawashap]] || [[word:shashawashap|shashawashap]] || [[word:kakawashap|kakawashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawashap|thawashap]] || [[word:jawashap|jawashap]] || [[word:shawashap|shawashap]] || [[word:kawashap|kawashap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawashap|thawashap]] || [[word:jawashap|jawashap]] || [[word:shawashap|shawashap]] || [[word:kawashap|kawashap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawashap|shawashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawashap|goshawashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawashap|gokishawashap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawashapnĂŒ|shawashapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawashapnknĂŒ|goshawashapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawashapnĂŒ|gokishawashapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawashapshĂ«|shawashapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawashapnkshĂ«|goshawashapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawashapshĂ«|gokishawashapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawashapro|shawashapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawashapnkro|goshawashapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawashapro|gokishawashapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawashapmu|shawashapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawashapnkmu|goshawashapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawashapmu|gokishawashapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawashapsher|shawashapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawashapnksher|goshawashapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawashapsher|gokishawashapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawashapng|shawashapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawashapnkng|goshawashapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawashapng|gokishawashapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawashapya|shawashapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawashapnkya|goshawashapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawashapya|gokishawashapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawashapyam|shawashapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawashapnkyam|goshawashapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawashapyam|gokishawashapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawashapnĂŒshĂ«|shawashapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawashapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawashapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawashapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawashapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawashapnĂŒro|shawashapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawashapnknĂŒro|goshawashapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawashapnĂŒro|gokishawashapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawashapnĂŒmu|shawashapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawashapnknĂŒmu|goshawashapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawashapnĂŒmu|gokishawashapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawashapshĂ«nĂŒ|shawashapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawashapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawashapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawashapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawashapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawashapshĂ«ro|shawashapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawashapnkshĂ«ro|goshawashapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawashapshĂ«ro|gokishawashapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawashapshĂ«mu|shawashapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawashapnkshĂ«mu|goshawashapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawashapshĂ«mu|gokishawashapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawashapronĂŒ|shawashapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawashapnkronĂŒ|goshawashapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawashapronĂŒ|gokishawashapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawashaproshĂ«|shawashaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawashapnkroshĂ«|goshawashapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawashaproshĂ«|gokishawashaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawashapromu|shawashapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawashapnkromu|goshawashapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawashapromu|gokishawashapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawashapmunĂŒ|shawashapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawashapnkmunĂŒ|goshawashapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawashapmunĂŒ|gokishawashapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawashapmushĂ«|shawashapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawashapnkmushĂ«|goshawashapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawashapmushĂ«|gokishawashapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawashapmuro|shawashapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawashapnkmuro|goshawashapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawashapmuro|gokishawashapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
